chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-490 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on CMA No.4752/2026 (Urgency) 2. For order on CMA No.4753/2026 (Contempt) 3. For order on CMA No.4754/2026 (Recalling) 27.2.2026 Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Buledi advocate for the petitioners Respondent No.21 Nadeem Shaikh is present in person --------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Respondent No.21 has filed these applications for contempt and recalling of the order dated 12.2.2026 passed by this Court, however, when confronted the legal position of the case that the matter is pending before the learned trial Court and he can move proper application before that Court if his cause still subsists, he seeks withdrawal of the listed applications on the aforesaid analogy. Both applications are disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
